text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I guess that's the way the wind blows...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah! Sorry I didn't win.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But it's okay. I'll get first next time, just like you
said!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've got it all figured out.
choice_data_list: Make sure you have more fun next time too.

There still may be some things you haven't
figured out.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're right. I wanna have fun racing.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess that means I have to try even harder!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. 'Cause there's no fun in losing all the time!
